---
title: ""
author: ""
date: ""
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - margin=1.6cm
      - top=1.4cm
      - bottom=1.6cm
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: blue
    urlcolor: blue
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: "Helvetica Neue"
    CJKmainfont: "Hiragino Sans"
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{xeCJK}
        \setCJKmainfont{Hiragino Sans}[
          UprightFont = * W3,
          BoldFont = * W6,
          ItalicFont = * W3,
          Scale = 0.95
        ]
        \setlist{nosep,leftmargin=1.1em,itemsep=0.2em,topsep=0.25em}
        \setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=1.4em}
        \setlist[description]{
          font=\normalfont,
          style=sameline,
          leftmargin=2.85cm,
          labelwidth=2.65cm,
          labelsep=0.2cm,
          itemsep=0.55em,
          parsep=0.05em,
          topsep=0.2em
        }
        \titleformat{\section}{\large\bfseries}{\thesection}{0em}{}[\vspace{-0.4em}\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}]
        \titleformat{\subsection}{\bfseries}{\thesubsection}{0em}{}
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.1em}{0.45em}
        \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{0.75em}{0.25em}
        \pagestyle{fancy}
        \fancyhf{}
        \fancyfoot[C]{\footnotesize\thepage}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        \renewcommand{\maketitle}{}
        \setlength{\parskip}{0.15em}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
---

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
{\LARGE\bfseries Chansu Han, Ph.D.}\\[0.55em]
{\normalsize Researcher, Center for Research on AI Security and Technology Evolution (CREATE)}\\[0.15em]
{\normalsize National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (NICT), Japan}\\[0.15em]
{\normalsize Visiting Assistant Professor, Kyushu University}\\[0.45em]
{\small
Email: han (at) nict.go.jp
\quad$\cdot$\quad
\href{https://gotchance.github.io/}{gotchance.github.io}
}\\[0.25em]
{\footnotesize
\href{https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZvvIWZ4AAAAJ\&hl=en}{Google Scholar}
\quad$\cdot$\quad
\href{https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Chansu-Han-2}{ResearchGate}
\quad$\cdot$\quad
\href{https://dblp.org/pid/186/6829.html}{dblp}
\quad$\cdot$\quad
\href{https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/Chansu-Han/3467047}{Semantic Scholar}
}\\[0.12em]
{\footnotesize
\href{https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/K-3263-2019}{Web of Science}
\quad$\cdot$\quad
\href{https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1728-5300}{ORCID}
\quad$\cdot$\quad
\href{https://www.linkedin.com/in/chansu-han-aa0857193/}{LinkedIn}
\quad$\cdot$\quad
\href{https://github.com/Gotchance}{GitHub}
}
\end{center}
\vspace{0.35em}
```

{{< include _content-vita.qmd >}}

{{< include _content-early.qmd >}}

{{< include _content.qmd >}}
